title: Smart bundle builder: cart-aware cross-sell with dynamic pricing

Show savings prominently. A/B test bundle placement (sticky bar vs modal). Web methods: getBundleRecommendations, calculateBundlePrice, trackBundleImpression, trackBundleAcceptance. CMS: BundleTemplates (productIds, basePrice, bundlePrice, rule). Leverages existing A/B testing framework and bundleAnalytics. Bundles drive 55% AOV lift.
close_reason: bundleBuilder.web.js shipped (commit 29dfbbb). 50 tests. Cart-aware recommendations, dynamic pricing (5-12% tiered), co-purchase patterns, bundle templates, performance analytics. 2760 total passing.

Use existing galleryHelpers.js compare logic as starting point. Frontend page code in src/pages/ with $w bindings per WIX-STUDIO-BUILD-SPEC.md Compare Page section.

title: Brand name 'Carolina Futons' hardcoded in seoHelpers createShipment — should use sharedTokens.brand
description: In ups-shipping.web.js createShipment(), ShipFrom.Name is hardcoded to 'Carolina Futons' (line ~293) instead of using brand.name from sharedTokens. The ORIGIN_ADDRESS was already migrated to use sharedTokens in the previous token extraction commit, but the ShipFrom.Name and Shipper.Name fields inside createShipment were missed. Quick fix.
close_reason: Fixed: Shipper.Name and Description now use brand.name from sharedTokens

Web methods: checkInventoryThreshold, getLowStockAlerts, updateReorderThreshold. CMS: LowStockAlerts collection. Low-stock urgency lifts conversion 3-5% on furniture sites and prevents overselling.

title: Address validation defaults to valid:true on API failure — shipping risk
description: In ups-shipping.web.js lines 506 and 531, when the UPS address validation API fails or returns non-ok, the code returns { valid: true, candidates: [] }. This silently accepts potentially invalid addresses, which will cause shipping failures post-checkout. Should return { valid: false, error: 'validation unavailable' } or at minimum log an alert. This is a P1 because it directly impacts order fulfillment.
close_reason: Fixed all 3 failure paths: non-OK response, catch block, and unrecognized-indicator fallthrough now return valid:false. Added 2 new tests.

close_reason: checkoutOptimization.web.js shipped: 7 functions (calculateOrderSummary, validateShippingAddress, getShippingOptions, getDeliveryEstimate, trackCheckoutStep, getAbandonmentRate, getExpressCheckoutSummary). 60 tests.

title: Extract time duration constants to shared module

title: EmailQueue uses ISO strings instead of Date type — migration risk
description: emailAutomation.web.js stores scheduledFor, sentAt, createdAt as ISO strings (Text) rather than Wix Date fields. This means CMS Dashboard sorting/filtering won't work natively on these fields. When creating EmailQueue collection, consider using Date type instead and converting in code. This is a design decision to document — ISO strings work for backend queries but make Dashboard UX worse.
close_reason: Fixed EmailQueue to use Date type instead of ISO strings. Commit 89e26be.

AC: 1) Member Page shows unique referral link + share buttons 2) Referral links track clicks and conversions 3) Referrer receives $25 credit on friend's first purchase 4) Friend gets 10% discount on first order 5) Referral dashboard shows: links shared, clicks, conversions, credits earned 6) Credits applied automatically at checkout 7) Anti-fraud: self-referral detection, minimum purchase requirement 8) Edge case: expired/invalid referral code shows helpful message
close_reason: Referral service: unique links, click/conversion tracking, /% credit, anti-fraud, Member Page dashboard. 49 tests. Commit 94d1f2e.

title: Customer testimonials collection and display system
description: Build testimonials system: collect customer stories (text + photo), curate best ones, display on Home page carousel and Product pages. Integration with reviews for cross-pollination. AC: 1) Testimonial submission form (name, photo, story, product) on Thank You page and Member Page 2) Admin curation: approve/reject/feature testimonials 3) Home page testimonial carousel (top 6 featured) 4) Product page testimonials filtered by product category 5) TestimonialSchema JSON-LD for SEO 6) Photo upload with auto-resize and optimization 7) Edge case: no testimonials yet shows placeholder content 8) Edge case: flagged/inappropriate content auto-hidden
close_reason: Added admin curation (approve/reject/feature/flag), auto-flagging on submit, getPendingTestimonials queue. 30 tests total. 2357 passing.

title: WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility audit and remediation
description:
Conduct comprehensive WCAG 2.1 AA compliance audit across all pages. Add keyboard navigation (tab order, skip links), fix color contrast on text/buttons, ensure all images have descriptive alt text, add ARIA landmarks to main sections.

AC:
1. All pages pass axe-core automated accessibility scan with 0 critical/serious violations
2. Complete keyboard navigation: all interactive elements reachable via Tab, usable via Enter/Space
3. Skip navigation link on every page
4. Color contrast ratio >= 4.5:1 for all text, >= 3:1 for large text
5. All images have descriptive alt text (not just 'image' or empty)
6. ARIA landmarks: banner, navigation, main, contentinfo on every page
7. Focus indicators visible on all interactive elements
8. Form labels associated with inputs, error messages announced to screen readers
close_reason: a11yHelpers.js with skip nav, focus management, contrast validation, ARIA helpers + 59 tests. Commit 7479bc8.

title: SEO content hub: topic clusters, internal linking, schema markup
description: Build SEO content hub system. Organize blog buying guides into topic clusters with pillar pages and supporting content. Auto-generate internal links between related content. Add BreadcrumbList, Article, FAQ, and HowTo schema markup. Web methods: getTopicCluster, generateInternalLinks, getSchemaMarkup, getSEOScore, getSitemapData. CMS: TopicClusters, InternalLinks. Leverages existing blogService (127 tests). AC: topic cluster engine, auto internal linking, comprehensive schema, SEO score calculator.
close_reason: Closed
